subsection.heading: In General.—
subsection.content: The Secretary may provide insurance or reinsurance under this section to or for an air carrier for 1 coverage period not to exceed 90 days. Except as otherwise provided in this section, such insurance or reinsurance shall be subject to the requirements of this chapter.

subsection.heading: Restrictions.—
subsection.chapeau: A policy for insurance or reinsurance issued under this section—

paragraph.chapeau: may not be issued unless the insurance carrier of the air carrier has unilaterally terminated the air carrier’s war risk liability coverage pursuant to—

subparagraph.content: an endorsement to the policy; or
an automatic termination provision in the policy or any endorsement thereto; and

paragraph.content: may cover hull, comprehensive, and third party liability risks.

subsection.heading: Premium.—
subsection.content: A premium for insurance or reinsurance provided under this section shall be calculated based on a prorated amount equivalent to the premium that was in effect under the terminated insurance carrier policy.

subsection.heading: Approval.—
subsection.chapeau: A policy for insurance or reinsurance provided under this section—

paragraph.content: shall be exempt from the requirements of section 44302(c); and
may provide coverage to the extent allowed under section 44303, as determined by the Secretary, notwithstanding any determination by the President in subsection (a)(1) of such section.
